site.name: Deadlock Voice Line Viewer
site.tagline: An easy-to-browse collection of Deadlock voice lines and conversations

infoBox.title: About This Site
infoBox.mainDescription: This site provides an easy way to browse and search through Deadlock's audio content, separated into two categories:

categories.name: Conversations
categories.description: Characters interacting with each other in sequence, forming complete dialogues.

categories.name: Voice Lines
categories.description: Individual character lines, including combat callouts, ability usage, and character-specific reactions.

sections.title: Transcription Accuracy
sections.content: Since Deadlock doesn't yet have official captions, the transcriptions on this site are community-created and may not be 100% accurate. If you notice any incorrect captions, please consider submitting a correction via a pull request to:

sections.title: Content Limitations
sections.content: Due to free hosting limitations, this site only includes voice lines that may be related to lore or are potentially interesting. If you know of lore-relevant or interesting voice lines that are missing, please submit an issue at:

infoBox.footer: Browse by character below or use the navigation menu to explore all conversations and voice lines.

footer.copyright: Valve, the Valve logo, Steam, the Steam logo, Deadlock, and the Deadlock logo are trademarks and/or registered trademarks of Valve Corporation. Deadlock Conversations Viewer is a fan website and not associated with Valve.

resources.label: Deadlock Wiki
resources.description: The wiki has some really good documentation on the game in it's current and old state.

resources.label: Neon Prime Voice Lines
resources.description: Source code and data for this project.
